hibernate-mapping.sql-query: DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDelivery where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId
SELECT ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDelivery WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId

INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges ( ROI_RequestCore_Seq, Previously_Released_Cost, Release_Date, Total_Pages, Total_Pages_Released, Salestax_Total_Amount, Salestax_Percentage_BillingLoc, Letter_Template_Name, Request_Status, Request_Date, LetterTemplate_FileId, Type, Invoice_Prebill_Date, Invoice_Due_Date, Resend_Date, Output_Method, Queue_Password, Overwrite_Due_Date, Invoice_Salestax, Base_Charge, Balance_Due, Facility_Code, Facility_Name, Invoice_Balance_Due, Is_Released, Billing_Type, Apply_SalesTax, Notes, Invoice_Due_Days, Unbillable, Unbillable_Amount, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Prebill_Status ) VALUES (:requestCoreId, :previouslyReleasedCost, :releaseDate, :totalPages, :totalPagesReleased, :salesTaxAmount, :salesTaxPercentage, :letterTemplateName, :requestStatus, :requestDate, :letterTemplateFileId, :type, :invoicePrebillDate, :invoiceDueDate, :resendDate, :outputMethod, :queuePassword, :overwriteDueDate, :invoiceSalesTax, :baseCharge, :balanceDue, :invoiceBillingLocCode, :invoiceBillinglocName, :invoiceBalanceDue, :isReleased, :billingType, :applySalesTax, :notes, :invoiceDueDays, :unbillable, :unbillableAmount, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy , :prebillStatus) ; SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument ( ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq, Amount, Copies, BillingTierName, TotalPages, Pages, BillingTierId, ReleaseCount, IsElectronic, RemoveBaseCharge, Has_Salestax, SalesTax_Amount, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq) VALUES (:requestCoreDeliveryChargesId, :amount, :copies, :billingtierName, :totalPages, :pages, :billingtierId, :releaseCount, :isElectronic, :removeBasecharge, :hasSalesTax, :salesTaxAmount, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy) ; SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee ( ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq, Amount, IsCustomFee, FeeType, Has_Salestax, SalesTax_Amount, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq) VALUES (:requestCoreDeliveryChargesId, :amount, :isCustomFee, :feeType, :hasSalesTax, :salesTaxAmount, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy) ; SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping( ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq, ShippingCharge, PostalCode, AddressType, State, ShippingUrl, Address1, Address2, ShippingWeight, TrackingNumber, Address3, City, WillReleaseShipped, ShippingMethod, OutputMethod, ShippingMethodId, Nonprintable_Attachment_Queue, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Country_Code, Country_Name) VALUES( :requestCoreDeliveryChargesId, :shippingCharge, :postalCode, :addressType, :state, :shippingUrl, :address1, :address2, :shippingWeight, :trackingNumber, :address3, :city, :willReleaseShipped, :shippingMethod, :outputMethod, :shippingMethodId, :nonPrintableAttachmentQueue, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy, :countryCode, :countryName); SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

SELECT TOP 1 ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq id, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDelivery WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId ORDER BY Modified_Dt desc;

SELECT invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, invoice.Is_Released isReleased, invoice.Previously_Released_Cost previouslyReleasedCost, invoice.Release_Date releaseDate, invoice.Base_Charge releaseCost, invoice.Total_Pages totalPages, (COALESCE(invoice.Previously_Released_Cost, 0) + COALESCE(invoice.Base_Charge, 0)) totalRequestCost, invoice.Total_Pages_Released totalPagesReleased, invoice.Salestax_Total_Amount salesTaxAmount, invoice.Salestax_Percentage_BillingLoc salesTaxPercentage, invoice.Billing_Type billingType, invoice.Letter_Template_Name letterTemplateName, invoice.Request_Status requestStatus, invoice.Request_Date requestDate, invoice.LetterTemplate_FileId letterTemplateFileId, invoice.Type type, invoice.Invoice_Prebill_Date invoicePrebillDate, invoice.Invoice_Due_Date invoiceDueDate, invoice.Resend_Date resendDate, invoice.Output_Method outputMethod, invoice.Queue_Password queuePassword, invoice.Overwrite_Due_Date overwriteDueDate, invoice.Invoice_Salestax invoiceSalesTax, invoice.Base_Charge baseCharge, invoice.Balance_Due balanceDue, invoice.Facility_Code invoiceBillingLocCode, invoice.Facility_Name invoiceBillinglocName, invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due invoiceBalanceDue, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorPayment reqPay WHERE reqPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqPay.IsDeleted = 0), 0) paymentAmount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorAdjustment reqAdj WHERE reqAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqAdj.IsDeleted = 0), 0) creditAdjustmentAmount, 0.00 debitAdjustmentAmount, invoice.Apply_SalesTax applySalesTax, invoice.Notes notes, RTRIM(COALESCE((select u.FullName from cabinet..USERS u where u.UserInstanceId = invoice.created_By_Seq), 'Deleted User - ' + CAST(invoice.created_By_Seq AS varchar(256)))) creator, invoice.Invoice_Due_Days invoiceDueDays, invoice.Unbillable unbillable, COALESCE (invoice.Unbillable_Amount, 0) unbillableAmount, invoice.Created_Dt createdDt, invoice.Created_By_Seq createdBy, invoice.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, invoice.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, invoice.Record_Version recordVersion, invoice.Prebill_Status prebillStatus FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestCoreId AND invoice.Type = 'Invoice' ORDER BY invoice.Modified_Dt desc;

SELECT requestorPayment.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq id, requestorPayment.ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorId, invpayment.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq requestCoreDeliveryChargesId, invpayment.Amount invoiceAppliedAmount, requestorPayment.Amount baseAmount, requestorPayment.UnappliedAmount totalUnappliedAmount, requestorPayment.PaymentType paymentMode, requestorPayment.PaymentDate paymentDate, requestorPayment.Description description, 'Payment' transactionType, requestorPayment.Created_Dt createdDt, requestorPayment.Created_By_Seq createdBy, requestorPayment.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, requestorPayment.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, requestorPayment.Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment requestorPayment, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment invpayment WHERE invpayment.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = requestorPayment.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq AND invpayment.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (:requestCoreDeliveryChargesIds) AND invPayment.IsDeleted = 0 UNION
SELECT requestorAdjustment.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq id, requestorAdjustment.ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorId, invAdjustment.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq requestCoreDeliveryChargesId, invAdjustment.Amount invoiceAppliedAmount, invAdjustment.Amount baseAmount, requestorAdjustment.UnappliedAmount totalUnappliedAmount, requestorAdjustment.Reason paymentMode, requestorAdjustment.AdjustmentDate paymentDate, requestorAdjustment.Note description, 'Adjustment' transactionType, requestorAdjustment.Created_Dt createdDt, requestorAdjustment.Created_By_Seq createdBy, requestorAdjustment.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, requestorAdjustment.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, requestorAdjustment.Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment requestorAdjustment, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment invAdjustment WHERE invAdjustment.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = requestorAdjustment.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq AND invAdjustment.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (:requestCoreDeliveryChargesIds) AND invAdjustment.IsDeleted = 0
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryChargesSeq
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryChargesSeq
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryChargesSeq
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryChargesId
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryChargesId

INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients ( ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq, ROI_Patients_Seq, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq ) VALUES (:requestCoreDeliveryChargesId, :requestHpfPatientsId, :requestNonHpfPatientsId, :createdDt, :createdBy, :modifiedDt, :modifiedBy) ; SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

SELECT ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping_Seq id, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq requestCoreDeliveryChargesId, ShippingCharge shippingCharge, PostalCode postalCode, AddressType addressType, State state, ShippingUrl shippingUrl, Address1 address1, Address2 address2, ShippingWeight shippingWeight, TrackingNumber trackingNumber, Address3 address3, City city, WillReleaseShipped willReleaseShipped, ShippingMethod shippingMethod, OutputMethod outputMethod, ShippingMethodId shippingMethodId, Nonprintable_Attachment_Queue nonPrintableAttachmentQueue, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion, Country_Code countryCode, Country_Name countryName FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :requestCoreDeliveryChargesId ) ORDER BY Modified_Dt desc;

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_Pages(ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq,ROI_Pages_Seq) ( SELECT :requestCoreDeliveryId, pages.ROI_Pages_Seq FROM cabinet..ROI_Pages pages, cabinet..ROI_Versions versions, cabinet..ROI_Documents documents, cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS encounters, cabinet..ROI_PATIENTS patients, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreToROI_Patients rctrp WHERE pages.ROI_Versions_Seq = versions.ROI_Versions_Seq AND versions.ROI_Documents_Seq = documents.ROI_Documents_Seq AND documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq = encounters.ROI_Encounters_Seq AND encounters.ROI_Patients_Seq = patients.ROI_Patients_Seq AND patients.ROI_Patients_Seq = rctrp.ROI_Patients_Seq AND rctrp.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestCoreId AND pages.imnet IN (:imnets) )
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_Pages where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId

SELECT rp.ROI_Pages_Seq id, COUNT(rp.ROI_Pages_Seq) releasedCount FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_Pages rp, ROI_RequestCoreDelivery delivery WHERE delivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = rp.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND delivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = (SELECT d.ROI_RequestCore_seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDelivery d WHERE d.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId) AND rp.ROI_Pages_Seq IN (SELECT p.ROI_Pages_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_Pages p WHERE p.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId) GROUP BY rp.ROI_Pages_Seq
UPDATE ROI_Pages SET SelectedForRelease = 1, isreleased = :isReleased WHERE ROI_Pages_Seq = :pagesSeq

SELECT rp.ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq id, COUNT(rp.ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq) releasedCount FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore rp, ROI_RequestCoreDelivery delivery WHERE delivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = rp.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND delivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = (SELECT d.ROI_RequestCore_seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDelivery d WHERE d.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId) AND rp.ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq IN (SELECT p.ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore p WHERE p.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId) GROUP BY rp.ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq
UPDATE ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore SET SelectedForRelease = 1, isreleased = :isReleased WHERE ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq = :roiSupplementalAttachmentId
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId

SELECT rp.ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq id, COUNT(rp.ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq) releasedCount FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore rp, ROI_RequestCoreDelivery delivery WHERE delivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = rp.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND delivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = (SELECT d.ROI_RequestCore_seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDelivery d WHERE d.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId) AND rp.ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq IN (SELECT p.ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore p WHERE p.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId) GROUP BY rp.ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq
UPDATE ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore SET SelectedForRelease = 1, isreleased = :isReleased WHERE ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq = :roiSupplementalDocumentId
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId

SELECT rp.ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq id, COUNT(rp.ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq) releasedCount FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore rp, ROI_RequestCoreDelivery delivery WHERE delivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = rp.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND delivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = (SELECT d.ROI_RequestCore_seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDelivery d WHERE d.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId) AND rp.ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq IN (SELECT p.ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore p WHERE p.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId) GROUP BY rp.ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq
UPDATE ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore SET SelectedForRelease = 1, isreleased = :isReleased WHERE ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq = :roiSupplementarityAttachmentId
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId

SELECT rp.ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq id, COUNT(rp.ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq) releasedCount FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore rp, ROI_RequestCoreDelivery delivery WHERE delivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = rp.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND delivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = (SELECT d.ROI_RequestCore_seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDelivery d WHERE d.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId) AND rp.ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq IN (SELECT p.ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore p WHERE p.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId) GROUP BY rp.ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq
UPDATE ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore SET SelectedForRelease = 1, isreleased = :isReleased WHERE ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq = :roiSupplementarityDocumentId
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges(ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) VALUES ( :requestCoreDeliveryId, :requestCoreDeliveryChargesId)
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :requestCoreDeliveryId
SELECT ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as invoiceId FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestCoreId AND Is_Released=0

SELECT CAST(( SELECT Count(ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestCoreId AND Is_Released = 0 AND Type = 'Invoice') AS bit) as isInvoiced
SELECT ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as invoiceId FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :releaseId
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges SET Is_Released=1 WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges SET Is_Released=0 WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId

INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreChargesSalesTaxReason ( ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq, Reason, Reason_Date, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq ) VALUES (:requestCoreChargesSeq, :reason, :reasonDate, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy) ; SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

SELECT ROI_RequestCoreChargesSalesTaxReason_Seq id, Reason reason, Reason_Date reasonDate, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesSalesTaxReason WHERE ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = :requestCoreChargesSeq ORDER BY Modified_Dt desc;

SELECT invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestCoreId, invoice.Is_Released isReleased, invoice.Previously_Released_Cost previouslyReleasedCost, invoice.Release_Date releaseDate, invoice.Base_Charge releaseCost, invoice.Total_Pages totalPages, (COALESCE(invoice.Previously_Released_Cost, 0) + COALESCE(invoice.Base_Charge, 0)) totalRequestCost, invoice.Total_Pages_Released totalPagesReleased, invoice.Salestax_Total_Amount salesTaxAmount, invoice.Salestax_Percentage_BillingLoc salesTaxPercentage, invoice.Billing_Type billingType, invoice.Letter_Template_Name letterTemplateName, invoice.Request_Status requestStatus, invoice.Request_Date requestDate, invoice.LetterTemplate_FileId letterTemplateFileId, invoice.Type type, invoice.Invoice_Prebill_Date invoicePrebillDate, invoice.Invoice_Due_Date invoiceDueDate, invoice.Resend_Date resendDate, invoice.Output_Method outputMethod, invoice.Queue_Password queuePassword, invoice.Overwrite_Due_Date overwriteDueDate, invoice.Invoice_Salestax invoiceSalesTax, invoice.Base_Charge baseCharge, invoice.Balance_Due balanceDue, invoice.Facility_Code invoiceBillingLocCode, invoice.Facility_Name invoiceBillinglocName, invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due invoiceBalanceDue, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorPayment reqPay WHERE reqPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqPay.IsDeleted = 0), 0) paymentAmount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorAdjustment reqAdj WHERE reqAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqAdj.IsDeleted = 0), 0) creditAdjustmentAmount, 0.00 debitAdjustmentAmount, invoice.Apply_SalesTax applySalesTax, invoice.Notes notes, RTRIM(COALESCE((select u.FullName from cabinet..USERS u where u.UserInstanceId = invoice.created_By_Seq), 'Deleted User - ' + CAST(invoice.created_By_Seq AS varchar(256)))) creator, invoice.Invoice_Due_Days invoiceDueDays,
COALESCE((SELECT SUM(adj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment adj, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv WHERE adj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = inv.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND adj.IsDeleted = 0), 0) requestCreditAdjustment, 0.00 requestDebitAdjustment, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Invoice_Balance_Due) FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv WHERE inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) requestBalanceDue, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(pay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment pay, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv WHERE pay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = inv.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND pay.IsDeleted = 0), 0) requestpayment, invoice.Unbillable unbillable, COALESCE (invoice.Unbillable_Amount, 0) unbillableAmount, invoice.Created_Dt createdDt, invoice.Created_By_Seq createdBy, invoice.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, invoice.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, invoice.Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :requestCoreDeliveryChargesId ) ORDER BY Modified_Dt desc;

SELECT invoice.Facility_Code billingLocation, invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq invoiceNumber, invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due overdueAmount, (isnull(requestor.NameLast,'') + ' ' + isnull(requestor.NameFirst,'')) requestorName, requestor.ContactPhone phoneNumber, requestor.RequestorTypeName requestorType, requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorId, DATEDIFF(dd, invoice.Invoice_Due_Date, getDate()) overDueDays, DATEDIFF(dd, invoice.Created_Dt, getDate()) invoiceAge FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due > 0 AND invoice.Facility_Code in ( :facility ) AND requestor.RequestorType in ( :requestorType ) AND requestor.NameLast like (:requestorName) ESCAPE('+') AND DATEDIFF(dd, invoice.Invoice_Due_Date, getDate()) >= :overDueFrom

SELECT invoice.Facility_Code billingLocation, invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq invoiceNumber, invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due overdueAmount, (isnull(requestor.NameLast,'') + ' ' + isnull(requestor.NameFirst,'')) requestorName, requestor.ContactPhone phoneNumber, requestor.RequestorTypeName requestorType, requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorId, DATEDIFF(dd, invoice.Invoice_Due_Date, getDate()) overDueDays, DATEDIFF(dd, invoice.Created_Dt, getDate()) invoiceAge FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due > 0 AND invoice.Facility_Code in ( :facility ) AND requestor.RequestorType in ( :requestorType ) AND requestor.NameLast like (:requestorName) ESCAPE('+') AND DATEDIFF(dd, invoice.Invoice_Due_Date, getDate()) >= :overDueFrom AND DATEDIFF(dd, invoice.Invoice_Due_Date, getDate()) <= :overDueTo

SELECT Amount amount, Copies copies, BillingTierName billingTierName, TotalPages totalPages, Pages pages, BillingTierId billingtierId, ReleaseCount releaseCount, isElectronic isElectronic , RemoveBasecharge removeBaseCharge, Has_Salestax hasSalesTax, SalesTax_Amount salesTaxAmount, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :rcdChargesSeq ) ORDER BY Modified_Dt desc;
SELECT DISTINCT BillingTierName billingTierName FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :rcdChargesSeq ) ORDER BY BillingTierName desc;

SELECT Has_Salestax hasSalesTax, SalesTax_Amount salesTaxAmount, Amount amount, IsCustomFee isCustomFee, FeeType feeType, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :rcdChargesSeq ) ORDER BY Modified_Dt desc;
SELECT DISTINCT FeeType feeType FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :rcdChargesSeq ) ORDER BY FeeType desc;
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesSalesTaxReason WHERE ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq= :requestCoreChargesSeq

SELECT ROI_Patients_Seq requestHpfPatientsId, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq requestNonHpfPatientsId FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :requestCoreDeliveryChargesId )

SELECT invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq invoiceId, invoice.Created_Dt createdDate, invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due amount FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND invoice.Type = 'Invoice' ORDER BY invoice.Created_Dt desc;

SELECT delivery.Created_Dt releaseDate, coalesce((SUM(charge.Invoice_Salestax)), 0) totalSalesTax, coalesce((SELECT Sum(d.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument d WHERE d.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charge.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq), 0) totalDocumentCharge, coalesce((SELECT Sum(f.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesfee f WHERE f.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charge.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq), 0) totalFeeCharge, coalesce((SELECT Sum(s.shippingCharge) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping s WHERE s.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charge.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq), 0) totalShippingCharge, coalesce((SELECT request.Unbillable FROM ROI_RequestCore request WHERE request.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charge.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0) unbillable
FROM ROI_RequestCoreDelivery delivery JOIN ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges R2R on R2R.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = delivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq JOIN ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charge on R2R.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charge.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq
WHERE delivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND charge.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = (SELECT TOP 1 ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = delivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND charge.TYPE = 'Invoice' ORDER BY Created_Dt, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq desc)
GROUP BY charge.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq, delivery.Created_Dt, charge.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges SET Output_Method = :outputMethod, Queue_Password = :queuePassword WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId
UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreDelivery SET Queue_Password = :queuePassword WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = :releaseId
UPDATE ROI_CoverLetterCore SET Queue_Password = :queuePassword WHERE ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq = :letterId
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

DELETE fee FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee fee, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charges WHERE fee.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

DELETE document FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument document, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charges WHERE document.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

DELETE shipping FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping shipping, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charges WHERE shipping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

DELETE patients FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients patients, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charges WHERE patients.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

if exists (select 1 from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId and type = 'Invoice') UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges SET Invoice_Balance_Due = :invoiceBalance, Modified_Dt = :modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedBy WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId else
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges SET Balance_Due = :invoiceBalance, Modified_Dt = :modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedBy WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges SET Prebill_Status = :prebillStatus WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :reqCoreSeq and Prebill_Status = 'Active'

SELECT invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, invoice.Is_Released isReleased, invoice.Previously_Released_Cost previouslyReleasedCost, invoice.Release_Date releaseDate, invoice.Base_Charge releaseCost, invoice.Total_Pages totalPages, (COALESCE(invoice.Previously_Released_Cost, 0) + COALESCE(invoice.Base_Charge, 0)) totalRequestCost, invoice.Total_Pages_Released totalPagesReleased, invoice.Salestax_Total_Amount salesTaxAmount, invoice.Salestax_Percentage_BillingLoc salesTaxPercentage, invoice.Billing_Type billingType, invoice.Letter_Template_Name letterTemplateName, invoice.Request_Status requestStatus, invoice.Request_Date requestDate, invoice.LetterTemplate_FileId letterTemplateFileId, invoice.Type type, invoice.Invoice_Prebill_Date invoicePrebillDate, invoice.Invoice_Due_Date invoiceDueDate, invoice.Resend_Date resendDate, invoice.Output_Method outputMethod, invoice.Queue_Password queuePassword, invoice.Overwrite_Due_Date overwriteDueDate, invoice.Invoice_Salestax invoiceSalesTax, invoice.Base_Charge baseCharge, invoice.Balance_Due balanceDue, invoice.Facility_Code invoiceBillingLocCode, invoice.Facility_Name invoiceBillinglocName, invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due invoiceBalanceDue, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorPayment reqPay WHERE reqPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqPay.IsDeleted = 0), 0) paymentAmount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorAdjustment reqAdj WHERE reqAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqAdj.IsDeleted = 0), 0) creditAdjustmentAmount, 0.00 debitAdjustmentAmount, invoice.Apply_SalesTax applySalesTax, invoice.Notes notes, RTRIM(COALESCE((select u.FullName from cabinet..USERS u where u.UserInstanceId = invoice.created_By_Seq), 'Deleted User - ' + CAST(invoice.created_By_Seq AS varchar(256)))) creator, invoice.Invoice_Due_Days invoiceDueDays, invoice.Unbillable unbillable, COALESCE (invoice.Unbillable_Amount, 0) unbillableAmount, invoice.Created_Dt createdDt, invoice.Created_By_Seq createdBy, invoice.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, invoice.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, invoice.Record_Version recordVersion, invoice.Prebill_Status prebillStatus FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestCoreId AND invoice.Type = 'Prebill'
ORDER BY invoice.Modified_Dt desc;

declare @RedCD nvarchar(10) set @RedCD = :balanceCriteria if(@RedCD = 'AtLeast') begin select facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging,SUM(prebillAmount) prebillAmount FROM ( select rcd.Facility_Name as facility, reqType.Name as requestorType, '' as requestorName, '' as requestorPhone, '' as requestId, '' as prebillNumber, null as prebillDate, sum(rcd.Base_Charge) as prebillAmount, '' as aging from ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, ROI_RequestCore reqCore where reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and rcd.Type ='PreBill' and rcd.Prebill_Status = 'Active' and rcd.Facility_Name IN(:facilities) and reqType.Name IN(:requestorTypeName) and reqCoreReq.NameLast like (:requestorName) ESCAPE('+') and reqCore.RequestStatus IN(:requestStatus) and rcd.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rcd.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rcd.Balance_Due >= :balanceDue group by rcd.Facility_Name,reqType.Name,reqCoreReq.NameLast, reqCoreReq.WorkPhone,reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rcd.Invoice_Prebill_Date)as temp group by facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging end else if(@RedCD = 'AtMost') begin select facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging,SUM(prebillAmount) prebillAmount FROM ( select rcd.Facility_Name as facility, reqType.Name as requestorType, '' as requestorName, '' as requestorPhone, '' as requestId, '' as prebillNumber, null as prebillDate, sum(rcd.Base_Charge) as prebillAmount, '' as aging from ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, ROI_RequestCore reqCore where reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and rcd.Type ='PreBill' and rcd.Prebill_Status = 'Active' and rcd.Facility_Name IN(:facilities) and reqType.Name IN(:requestorTypeName) and reqCoreReq.NameLast like (:requestorName) ESCAPE('+') and reqCore.RequestStatus IN(:requestStatus) and rcd.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rcd.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rcd.Balance_Due <= :balanceDue group by rcd.Facility_Name,reqType.Name,reqCoreReq.NameLast, reqCoreReq.WorkPhone,reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rcd.Invoice_Prebill_Date)as temp group by facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging end else if(@RedCD = 'Equal') begin select facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging,SUM(prebillAmount) prebillAmount FROM ( select rcd.Facility_Name as facility, reqType.Name as requestorType, '' as requestorName, '' as requestorPhone, '' as requestId, '' as prebillNumber, null as prebillDate, sum(rcd.Base_Charge) as prebillAmount, '' as aging from ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, ROI_RequestCore reqCore where reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and rcd.Type ='PreBill' and rcd.Prebill_Status = 'Active' and rcd.Facility_Name IN(:facilities) and reqType.Name IN(:requestorTypeName) and reqCoreReq.NameLast like (:requestorName) ESCAPE('+') and reqCore.RequestStatus IN(:requestStatus) and rcd.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rcd.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rcd.Balance_Due = :balanceDue group by rcd.Facility_Name,reqType.Name,reqCoreReq.NameLast, reqCoreReq.WorkPhone,reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rcd.Invoice_Prebill_Date)as temp group by facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging end else begin select facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging,SUM(prebillAmount) prebillAmount FROM ( select rcd.Facility_Name as facility, reqType.Name as requestorType, '' as requestorName, '' as requestorPhone, '' as requestId, '' as prebillNumber, null as prebillDate, sum(rcd.Base_Charge) as prebillAmount, '' as aging from ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, ROI_RequestCore reqCore where reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and rcd.Type ='PreBill' and rcd.Prebill_Status = 'Active' and rcd.Facility_Name IN(:facilities) and reqType.Name IN(:requestorTypeName) and reqCoreReq.NameLast like (:requestorName) ESCAPE('+') and reqCore.RequestStatus IN(:requestStatus) and rcd.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rcd.Created_Dt <= :toDt group by rcd.Facility_Name,reqType.Name,reqCoreReq.NameLast, reqCoreReq.WorkPhone,reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rcd.Invoice_Prebill_Date)as temp group by facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone, requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging end

IN(:facilities) and reqType.Name IN(:requestorTypeName) and reqCore.RequestStatus IN(:requestStatus) and rcd.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rcd.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rcd.Balance_Due = :balanceDue group by rcd.Facility_Name,reqType.Name,reqCoreReq.NameLast, reqCoreReq.WorkPhone,reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rcd.Invoice_Prebill_Date)as temp group by facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging end else begin select facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging,SUM(prebillAmount) prebillAmount FROM ( select rcd.Facility_Name as facility, reqType.Name as requestorType, reqCoreReq.NameLast as requestorName, reqCoreReq.WorkPhone as requestorPhone, '' as requestId, '' as prebillNumber, null as prebillDate, sum(rcd.Base_Charge) as prebillAmount, '' as aging from ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, ROI_RequestCore reqCore where reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and rcd.Type ='PreBill' and rcd.Prebill_Status = 'Active' and rcd.Facility_Name IN(:facilities) and reqType.Name IN(:requestorTypeName) and reqCore.RequestStatus IN(:requestStatus) and rcd.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rcd.Created_Dt <= :toDt group by rcd.Facility_Name,reqType.Name,reqCoreReq.NameLast, reqCoreReq.WorkPhone,reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rcd.Invoice_Prebill_Date)as temp group by facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone, requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging end

declare @RedCD nvarchar(10) set @RedCD = :balanceCriteria if(@RedCD = 'AtLeast') begin select facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone reqCoreReq.WorkPhone as requestorPhone, reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq as requestId, 'PRE'+CAST(ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as varchar) as prebillNumber, rcd.Created_Dt as prebillDate, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, ROI_RequestCore reqCore where reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and IN(:facilities) and reqType.Name IN(:requestorTypeName) and reqCoreReq.NameLast like (:requestorName) ESCAPE('+') and reqCore.RequestStatus IN(:requestStatus) and rcd.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rcd.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rcd.Balance_Due >= :balanceDue group by rcd.Facility_Name,reqType.Name,reqCoreReq.NameLast, reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,reqCoreReq.WorkPhone,reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rcd.Created_Dt)as temp group by rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and rcd.Type ='PreBill' and rcd.Prebill_Status = 'Active' and rcd.Facility_Name reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,reqCoreReq.WorkPhone,reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rcd.Created_Dt)as temp group by facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestId,requestorPhone, prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging end else if(@RedCD = 'Equal') begin select facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestorPhone ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging,SUM(prebillAmount) prebillAmount FROM ( select rcd.Facility_Name as facility, reqType.Name as requestorType, reqCoreReq.NameLast as requestorName, reqCoreReq.WorkPhone as requestorPhone, reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq as requestId, 'PRE'+CAST(ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as varchar) as prebillNumber, rcd.Created_Dt as prebillDate, sum(rcd.Base_Charge) as prebillAmount, DATEDIFF(d,rcd.Created_Dt,GETDATE()) as aging from ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, ROI_RequestCore reqCore where reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and rcd.Type ='PreBill' and rcd.Prebill_Status = 'Active' and rcd.Facility_Name IN(:facilities) and reqType.Name IN(:requestorTypeName) and reqCoreReq.NameLast like (:requestorName) ESCAPE('+') and reqCore.RequestStatus IN(:requestStatus) and rcd.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rcd.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rcd.Balance_Due = :balanceDue group by rcd.Facility_Name,reqType.Name,reqCoreReq.NameLast, reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,reqCoreReq.WorkPhone,reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rcd.Created_Dt)as temp group by ,requestId,prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging,SUM(prebillAmount) prebillAmount FROM ( select rcd.Facility_Name as facility, reqType.Name as requestorType, reqCoreReq.NameLast as requestorName, reqCoreReq.WorkPhone as requestorPhone, reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq as requestId, 'PRE'+CAST(ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as varchar) as prebillNumber, rcd.Created_Dt as prebillDate, sum(rcd.Base_Charge) as prebillAmount, DATEDIFF(d,rcd.Created_Dt,GETDATE()) as aging from ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, ROI_RequestCore reqCore where reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and rcd.Type ='PreBill' and rcd.Prebill_Status = 'Active' and rcd.Facility_Name IN(:facilities) and reqType.Name IN(:requestorTypeName) and reqCoreReq.NameLast like (:requestorName) ESCAPE('+') and reqCore.RequestStatus IN(:requestStatus) and rcd.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rcd.Created_Dt <= :toDt group by rcd.Facility_Name,reqType.Name,reqCoreReq.NameLast, reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,reqCoreReq.WorkPhone,reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rcd.Created_Dt)as temp group by facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestId,requestorPhone, prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging end

by facility,requestorType,requestorName,requestId,requestorPhone, prebillNumber,prebillDate,aging end

SELECT FullName userName, UserInstanceId userId into #temp from [USERS] where FullName in (:userName) select userdata.userName, '' as facility, null as createdDate, '' as requestorType, '' as requestorName, '' as requestId, '' as mrn, '' as invoiceNumber, '' as paymentMethod, '' as paymentDetails, 0 as paymentId, COALESCE(SUM(paymentAmount), 0.00) paymentAmount
From ( select us.userName as userName, us.userId as userId, rrcp.Amount as paymentAmount FROM ROI_Requestor rr, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment rrcp, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rdc, ROI_RequestorType rrt, ROI_RequestorPayment rrp, #temp us
where us.userId = rrcp.Created_By_Seq and rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = rrp.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rrcp.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = rrp.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq and rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rrcp.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and rr.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = rrt.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and rrcp.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rrcp.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rrt.Name IN(:requestorType) and rdc.FACILITY_NAME in (:facilities) and rrcp.IsDeleted <> '1'
UNION ALL
select us.userName as userName, us.userId as userId, rrp.UnappliedAmount as paymentAmount FROM ROI_Requestor rr, ROI_RequestorType rrt, ROI_RequestorPayment rrp, #temp us
where us.userId = rrp.Created_By_Seq and rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = rrp.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rr.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = rrt.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and rrp.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rrp.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rrt.Name IN(:requestorType) and rrp.IsDeleted <> '1' ) as temp RIGHT JOIN #temp userdata on temp.userName = userdata.userName group by userdata.userName, userdata.userId order by userdata.userName

SELECT FullName, UserInstanceId into #temp from [USERS] where FullName in (:userName) select us.FullName as userName, rdc.FACILITY_NAME as facility, rrcp.Created_Dt as createdDate, rrt.Name as requestorType, rr.NameLast as requestorName, rdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq as requestId, pat.MRN as mrn, rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as invoiceNumber, rrp.PaymentType as paymentMethod, (select case when upper(rrp.PaymentType) <> 'CASH' then rrp.Description else '' end) as paymentDetails, CAST(rrcp.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment_Seq as varchar) as paymentId, rrcp.Amount as paymentAmount FROM ROI_Requestor rr, ROI_RequestorType rrt, ROI_PATIENTS pat, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients rpt, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rdc, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment rrcp, ROI_RequestorPayment rrp, #temp us
where us.UserInstanceId = rrcp.Created_By_Seq and rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = rrp.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rr.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = rrt.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and pat.ROI_Patients_Seq = rpt.ROI_Patients_Seq and rpt.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rrcp.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and rrcp.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = rrp.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq and rrcp.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rrcp.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rrt.Name IN(:requestorType) and rdc.FACILITY_NAME in (:facilities) and rrcp.IsDeleted <> '1' group by us.FullName,rdc.FACILITY_NAME,rrcp.Created_Dt,rrt.Name,rr.NameLast,rdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,pat.MRN ,rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rrp.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq,rrp.PaymentType,rrp.Description,rrcp.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment_Seq,rrcp.Amount
UNION
select us.FullName as userName, rdc.FACILITY_NAME as facility, rrcp.Created_Dt as createdDate, rrt.Name as requestorType, rr.NameLast as requestorName, rdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq as requestId, rspat.MRN as mrn, rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as invoiceNumber, rrp.PaymentType as paymentMethod, (select case when upper(rrp.PaymentType) <> 'CASH' then rrp.Description else '' end) as paymentDetails, CAST(rrcp.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment_Seq as varchar) as paymentId, rrcp.Amount as paymentAmount FROM #temp us, ROI_Requestor rr, ROI_RequestorType rrt, ROI_SupplementalPatients pat, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore rspat, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore rrs, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rdc, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment rrcp, ROI_RequestorPayment rrp
where us.UserInstanceId = rrcp.Created_By_Seq and rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = rrp.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rr.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = rrt.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and pat.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq = rspat.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq and rspat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = rrs.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and rrs.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rrcp.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and rrcp.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = rrp.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq and rrcp.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rrcp.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rrt.Name IN(:requestorType) and rdc.FACILITY_NAME in (:facilities) and rrcp.IsDeleted <> '1' group by us.FullName,rdc.FACILITY_NAME,rrcp.Created_Dt,rrt.Name,rr.NameLast,rdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,rspat.MRN ,rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq,rrp.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq,rrp.PaymentType,rrp.Description,rrcp.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment_Seq,rrcp.Amount
UNION
select us.FullName as userName, '' as facility, rrp.Created_Dt as createdDate, rrt.Name as requestorType, rr.NameLast as requestorName, '' as requestId, '' as mrn, '' as invoiceNumber, rrp.PaymentType as paymentMethod, (select case when upper(rrp.PaymentType) <> 'CASH' then rrp.Description else '' end) as paymentDetails, 'UN-' + CAST(rrp.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq as varchar) as paymentId, rrp.UnappliedAmount as paymentAmount FROM #temp us, ROI_Requestor rr, ROI_RequestorType rrt, ROI_RequestorPayment rrp
where us.UserInstanceId = rrp.Created_By_Seq and rr.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = rrt.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = rrp.ROI_Requestor_Seq and rrp.Created_Dt <= :toDt and rrp.Created_Dt >= :fromDt and rrt.Name IN(:requestorType) and rrp.UnappliedAmount != 0 and rrp.IsDeleted <> '1' group by us.FullName,rrp.Created_Dt,rrt.Name,rr.NameLast,rrp.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq,rrp.PaymentType,rrp.Description,rrp.UnappliedAmount
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId

UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment SET ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = (select top 1 ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and type='Invoice' order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq desc )
WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and type = 'Prebill' )

UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment SET ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = (select top 1 ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and type='Invoice' order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq desc )
WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and type = 'Prebill' )

SELECT top 1 Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment rcdp WHERE rcd.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rcdp.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and rcd.Type = 'PreBill'

SELECT top 1 Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment rcda WHERE rcd.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rcda.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and rcd.Type = 'PreBill'

select COALESCE(sum(Amount), 0) from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment rcdp WHERE rcd.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rcdp.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and rcd.Type = 'Prebill' and rcd.Base_Charge <> :Charge ;

select COALESCE(sum(Amount), 0) from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment rcda WHERE rcd.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rcda.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and rcd.Type = 'Prebill' and rcd.Base_Charge <> :Charge ;
